excerpt: The official programme page for Master of Divinity lists 2nd round opening on 2025-09-01 and closing on 2026-04-10. Source: https://www.gs.cuhk.edu.hk/admissions/application-deadline 1st round: 27 February 2026 2nd round: 10 April 2026 Applications will be processed on a rolling basis until all places have been filled. Therefore, early applications are strongly encouraged.
